arts.ttl: Manchester City dealing with Kevin De Bruyne uncertainty following Rodri blow
arts.sum: Manchester City are sweating over the fitness of Kevin De Bruyne ahead of Saturday afternoon's trip to Newcastle United in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: 'Rodri injury could be a season-changing blow': Man City expert 'nervous' amid midfielder concern
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney from Esteemed Kompany tells Sports Mole that Rodri's knee injury sustained in the 2-2 draw with Arsenal on Sunday "could be a season-changing blow" for Pep Guardiola's side.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Man City's disappointing record without Rodri, as reports claim the superstar is set to be 'OUT for the rest of the season with a cruciate ligament rupture'
arts.sum: The 28-year-old, who is a leading contender for the Ballon d'Or after helping Spain win Euro 2024, was forced off with a serious knee injury just 21 minutes into City's 2-2 draw with Arsenal.

arts.ttl: What Leandro Trossard told Arsenal team-mates after sending off at Manchester City
arts.sum: Leandro Trossard became the second Arsenal star to be sent off for kicking the ball away over recent weeks and had some defiant words for his team-mates after his dismissal

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans argue reports of Rodri being out for the season are 'karma' after claiming the Man City midfielder 'tried to end Martin Odegaard's career' during international clash last year
arts.sum: Arsenal fans are showing little sympathy for Rodri following reports that he could be out of the rest of the season as they point to a challenge the City man made on Martin Odegaard last year.

arts.ttl: Former Man City star offers himself to Barcelona after Ter Stegen injury
arts.sum: Former Manchester City goalkeeper Claudio Bravo is willing to come out of retirement and play for Barcelona following Marc-Andre ter Stegen's cruciate ligament injury.

arts.ttl: 'Running the risk': Dermot Gallagher shares his verdict on Erling Haaland throwing the ball at Gabriel's head
Rodri could miss rest of season due to ACL injury suffered against Arsenal
arts.sum: City fear worst after midfielder went down in agony Absence would represent big blow to City’s title hopes Rodri suffered an anterior cruciate ligament injury in Manchester City’s 2-2 draw with Arsenal on Sunday and may miss the rest of the season as a result, handing the champions a serious blow in their bid to win a fifth successive Premier League crown. The 28-year-old was forced off after 21 minutes at the Etihad Stadium having gone down under minimal contact following a challenge by Thomas Partey inside the Arsenal area but in clear agony. City await further tests but fear the worst in regards to the availability of one of Pep Guardiola’s most important and influential players. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Gabriel breaks silence on Erling Haaland incident with Man City threat
arts.sum: Arsenal centre-back Gabriel Magalhaes warns Manchester City that the Gunners will be "waiting" for them at the Emirates following their fiery 2-2 draw at the Etihad.

arts.ttl: Gabriel response to Erling Haaland incident ridicules Arsenal reaction to Man City celebrations
arts.sum: Gabriel Magalhaes has broken his silence on the incident which saw Erling Haaland throw a ball at his head in the aftermath of Manchester City's late equaliser vs Arsenal.
